For simple_tokenize, the regex pattern r"\w+|[^\w\s]" matches either word characters or individual punctuation. Use re.findall() to get all matches.
count_tokens just calls simple_tokenize and returns the length with len(). estimate_cost divides the count by 1000, multiplies by price_per_1k, and rounds to 6 places.
simple_tokenize: return re.findall(r"\w+|[^\w\s]", text). count_tokens: return len(simple_tokenize(text)). estimate_cost: return round((count_tokens(text) / 1000) * price_per_1k, 6).
